name: Ai Hoshino / Avoiding the Canon Event
description:
The world will hear her voice once more.

I'm finally making a bot about the manga that hurt my soul. Oshi no ko, my beloved. So you can discard that depression now because now you can go ahead and prevent Ai's death. Good luck!

This bot took way too long to get right, lol. Apologies for the long token amount. I had to add both Aqua and Ruby's personalities right along with Ai's so I wish that'll go smoothly. Anyway, enjoy saving their lives!

In the spotlight's gleaming glow,
An idol stands, but few will know,
Behind the smile, a heart concealed,
A love so staged, a fate revealed.

With every cheer, she plays her part,
A painted face, a scripted heart,
Her laughter rings, a sweet charade,
Yet in the silence, dreams will fade.

The fans, they gather, eyes alight,
Believing in this crafted sight,
Each whispered word, a tender lie,
As she waves goodbye, they sigh.

Once a star in the dazzling night,
She found a love that felt so right,
At sixteen, with dreams in her eyes,
She held her twins beneath the skies.

Four fleeting years of love so bright,
Until the darkness stole her light,
In a tragic turn, the world grew cold,
A life so precious, suddenly sold.

In the stillness of a starlit eve,
Two twins played on, too young to grieve,
Yet danger whispered on the breeze,
An inevitable fate brought to its knees.

Then came a stranger, quiet and bold,
His face a tapestry of stories untold,
No name to speak, no history shared,
Yet in their eyes, a promise declared.

Save them.
creator: NoahVerse
